location..validate: newData.hasChildren(['lat','lng','updatedAt']) && newData.child('lat').isNumber() && newData.child('lng').isNumber() && newData.child('lat').val() >= -90 && newData.child('lat').val() <= 90 && newData.child('lng').val() >= -180 && newData.child('lng').val() <= 180 && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber()

$deliveryId..read: auth != null && (root.child('deliveryApp').child($empresaId).child('roles').child(auth.uid).val() === 'admin' || data.child('driverId').val() === auth.uid || data.child('driverUid').val() === auth.uid)

status..write: auth != null && (root.child('deliveryApp').child($empresaId).child('roles').child(auth.uid).val() === 'admin' || data.parent().child('driverId').val() === auth.uid || data.parent().child('driverUid').val() === auth.uid)

lastUpdate..write: auth != null && (root.child('deliveryApp').child($empresaId).child('roles').child(auth.uid).val() === 'admin' || data.parent().child('driverId').val() === auth.uid || data.parent().child('driverUid').val() === auth.uid)
